utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (with flight details and costs), accommodation (with hotel selection and costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Each element is fully specified with appropriate details and costs. Therefore, all items are successfully included and complete.
